parameters.query: SELECT revision_status, document_type, COUNT(*) as doc_count FROM document_metadata GROUP BY revision_status, document_type;

SELECT document_type, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE revision_status = 'superseded') as superseded_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE revision_status = 'active') as active_count, COUNT(*) as total_count FROM document_metadata GROUP BY document_type;

SELECT process_line, shift, COUNT(*) as query_count, AVG(confidence_score) as avg_confidence, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hallucination_flag = true) as hallucination_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence_score < 0.4) as low_confidence_count, SUM(cost_estimate) as total_cost, AVG(total_latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms FROM retrieval_logs WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY process_line, shift;

SELECT query_text, confidence_score, process_line, user_role, created_at FROM retrieval_logs WHERE confidence_score < 0.4 AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY confidence_score ASC LIMIT 20;
SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) as event_count FROM security_audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY event_type;
SELECT rl.matched_indexes, COUNT(*) as query_count, SUM(rl.cost_estimate) as total_cost FROM retrieval_logs rl WHERE rl.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY rl.matched_indexes;

INSERT INTO query_insights (process_line, shift, query_count, avg_confidence, low_confidence_queries, cost_per_index, period_start, period_end) SELECT process_line, shift, COUNT(*), AVG(confidence_score), jsonb_agg(CASE WHEN confidence_score < 0.4 THEN jsonb_build_object('query', query_text, 'confidence', confidence_score, 'user_role', user_role) ELSE NULL END) FILTER (WHERE confidence_score < 0.4), jsonb_object_agg(COALESCE(matched_indexes[1], 'unknown'), cost_estimate) FILTER (WHERE cost_estimate IS NOT NULL), NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes', NOW() FROM retrieval_logs WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY process_line, shift;

DELETE FROM security_audit_log WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'; DELETE FROM retrieval_logs WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'; DELETE FROM query_insights WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days';
